hero.subtitle: Proud to be the pioneering force in business data analytics driven by user trends, empowered by cutting‑edge technology and a team of engineers from Ho Chi Minh University of Technology.

features.title: Powerful Data Collection & AI Analysis
features.subtitle: Connect multiple social media platforms and let our AI transform raw data into actionable insights
features.step1Description: Listen to discussions about your business or competitors from the perspective of social media users.
features.step2Description: Standardize data, detect trends, and train models to extract hidden value.
features.step3Description: Transform insights into charts, dashboards, and easy-to-understand reports to support your business unconditionally.

solutions.title: Your platform to make smarter decisions
solutions.subtitle: Unlock powerful insights and drive growth with our all-in-one platform. We provide the tools you need to succeed in the competitive digital landscape.
solutions.solution1Description: Proactively identify and manage potential risks before they escalate, protecting your brand reputation.
solutions.solution2Description: Stay ahead by capturing and analyzing emerging trends in your industry in real-time.
solutions.solution3Description: Gain an edge by tracking, analyzing marketing strategies and customer responses to competitors.
solutions.solution4Description: Measure marketing and social media campaign effectiveness visually to optimize ROI.
solutions.solution5Description: Understand target audience needs, desires and behaviors through social media data analysis.
solutions.solution6Description: Listen to customer feedback to improve products, services and enhance user experience.

feedback.title: Trusted by our customers
feedback.subtitle: Thousands of businesses have transformed how they analyze social media data with our platform

testimonials.testimonial1Quote: SMAP Solution helped us understand our customers and competitors better. ROI increased 200% in just 6 months. This is an indispensable tool for our marketing strategy.
testimonials.testimonial2Quote: With SMAP, we can detect PR crises before they spread. The support team is very professional and the platform is easy to use.
testimonials.testimonial3Quote: Intuitive dashboard, accurate insights and automated reporting save me 10 hours every week. I can focus on strategy instead of manual data analysis.

case1.title: Engagement Growth
case1.description: Fashion brand increased engagement rate from 2% to 5% in 3 months

about.title: About Us

mission.title: Mission
mission.description: Help businesses make smarter decisions by harnessing the power of social media data and artificial intelligence.

vision.title: Vision
vision.description: Become the leading social media analytics platform in Southeast Asia, accompanying the growth of thousands of businesses.

story.title: Our Story
story.description: Founded by a team of engineers from Ho Chi Minh University of Technology, SMAP Solution was born from a passion to turn data into real value for businesses. We believe every business deserves world-class analytics tools.
